notes: Immortal 1.46 — screensaver polish. Photos now drift with a slow, tvOS-style Ken Burns zoom and pan, and your own photos (local folder or NAS) show a subtle "place · date" caption read from their EXIF, with the place reverse-geocoded — no API key needed. Public iCloud and Google Photos shared albums that used to fall back to the built-in feed when their links expired now refresh and keep playing. The anti-burn-in pixel-shift is much gentler and can be switched off under Screensaver › Display. Plus a reliability fix so the caption's location reliably resolves.
